{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Captain's combat suit
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion]] is repairing his combat suit.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
